allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.get\('config',{}\).items\(\) if 'gateway' in k.lower\(\) or 'envoy' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
